fha.notes: San Diego is a high-cost area, so FHA limits are at the ceiling. These limits apply to the total mortgage amount including the financed upfront MIP.

conforming.notes: 2025 baseline conforming limit. San Diego County is at the standard limit. 2026 limits not yet announced — update when FHFA publishes (typically November). Loans above this amount require jumbo financing.

va.notes: No loan limit for veterans with full entitlement (no prior VA loans outstanding). Veterans with reduced entitlement may be subject to county limits matching the conforming limit. $0 down payment regardless of loan size with full entitlement.

jumbo.source: Industry standard — any loan exceeding the conforming limit
jumbo.notes: Jumbo loans typically require 10-20% down payment, higher credit scores (700+), and larger cash reserves. Rates may be slightly higher than conforming. Not eligible for most DPA programs.

calhfaIncomeLimits.notes: CalHFA income limits vary by program, county, and household size. These are approximate ranges for San Diego County. Always verify with a CalHFA-approved lender.

myHome.notes: Approximate — actual limits vary. Check CalHFA income limit tables.

dreamForAll.notes: Income limits vary by funding round. First-generation homebuyers may have different thresholds.
